name: I'm in an entryway
hints: The castle entryway with the drawbridge mechanism and an old lever.
PULL LEVER or PUSH LEVER to lower the drawbridge, creating a permanent path in and out of the castle.
Use the lever to lower the drawbridge. EAST enters the courtyard. Once lowered, the drawbridge provides easy access between the field and castle.
notes: Castle entryway with the drawbridge lever. PULL/PUSH LEVER to lower the drawbridge for permanent access. East leads to the courtyard (room 3). West leads to the drawbridge (room 2) when lowered.
